summary: Complete testing of PicParty Cotizador with real prices, PICPARTYLIVE landing page, and client phone security feature. All 8 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: BACKEND: API root accessible
BACKEND: /api/quotes - Create quote with all fields including phone
BACKEND: /api/quotes - Get all quotes
BACKEND: Cabina de Fotos prices verified (2h=$2,699, 3h=$3,299, 4h=$3,799, 5h=$4,699)
BACKEND: Video 360° prices verified (2h=$3,299, 3h=$3,899, 4h=$4,499, 5h=$4,999)
BACKEND: PICPARTYLIVE prices verified ($700, $1,000, $1,500)
BACKEND: /api/live/sessions - Get all sessions
BACKEND: /api/live/sessions/create with client_phone field
BACKEND: /api/live/scan/{code} - Scan existing code works
BACKEND: /api/live/scan - Invalid code returns 404
BACKEND: LiveSession model has client_phone field for download key
BACKEND: /api/live/photos - Get photos for event
BACKEND: /api/live/photos/count - Get photo count
FRONTEND: Cotizador page loads with all prices displayed
FRONTEND: Cabina de Fotos buttons show correct prices ($2,699, $3,299, $3,799, $4,699)
FRONTEND: Video 360° buttons show correct prices ($3,299, $3,899, $4,499, $4,999)
FRONTEND: PICPARTYLIVE buttons show correct prices ($700, $1,000, $1,500)
FRONTEND: Phone validation - Shows error when phone is missing
FRONTEND: Folio generation - COT-XXX format generated successfully
FRONTEND: /live landing page shows sales content when accessed without code
FRONTEND: Landing page has 'Quiero PICPARTYLIVE en mi fiesta' CTA button
FRONTEND: Landing page has 'Ver Demo (Código: 9022)' button
FRONTEND: Admin login with OCTAVIO/CHELO1980 works
FRONTEND: Admin - Create Session form has 'Teléfono del Cliente' field marked as (Clave de descarga)

phone_validation.details: Phone is required (mínimo 10 dígitos), shows error toast when missing

content: El Muro de Fotos en Tiempo Real

admin_client_phone_field.note: Los últimos 4 dígitos serán la clave para descargar las fotos

seed_data_creation: Created test quotes with various service configurations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Cotizador features verified: 1) Cabina de Fotos prices (2h-5h), 2) Video 360° prices (2h-5h), 3) PICPARTYLIVE prices ($700/$1,000/$1,500), 4) Phone validation mandatory, 5) Folio generation (COT-XXX format), 6) /live landing page shows sales content without code, 7) Admin panel has client_phone field in create session form, 8) /api/quotes endpoint saves all quote data including phone.
